title: Anti Invisibility
description:

body:
AntiInv is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft that disables player invisibility on the client. The mod forces invisible players to be rendered normally, regardless of how the invisibility is applied (potion effects, entity metadata, or server-side logic).

Disclaimer
This mod may not be allowed on some servers and could violate server rules or terms of service.

Use this mod at your own risk.
The developer is not responsible for any account bans, penalties, or consequences resulting from the use of this mod.
